title: 5 Managing PaymentStreamГўВ„Вў Direct Users
body_text:
5	Managing PaymentStreamГўВ„Вў Direct Users
5.1	Overview of Managing PaymentStream Direct Users
PaymentStream
Direct users are managed through CPS Admin or User Management. Each
PaymentStream
Direct function is listed as a separate application on CPS Admin and in User Management. Users only see the functions to which they have authorized access.
Each
PaymentStream
Direct user must be set up as a Client Centre User or a CPS Admin Security Officer. The userГўВҖВҷs
PaymentStream
Direct permissions are defined in the individualГўВҖВҷs profile in CPS Admin or in User Management.
Note:	See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on adding, editing, and deleting Client Centre Users and CPS Admin Security Officers. Alternatively, see the User Management Part for procedures on adding, editing, and deleting Client Centre Users and CPS Admin Security Officers.
5.2	PaymentStream Direct ГўВҖВ“ CPS Admin Application IDs Table
The
PaymentStream
Direct functions to which a user has access are defined in the userГўВҖВҷs profile on CPS Admin or in User Management. The following table provides the name of the application ID that corresponds to the
PaymentStream
Direct function, a description of the function, and information on any parameters associated with the function.
Note:	CPS Admin Security Officers only see the
PaymentStream
Direct applications to which they can assign Client Centre Users access (i.e., administrative access).
Application ID
(as displayed on
CPS Admin)
Description
Additional Parameters
(as displayed on CPS Admin. ГўВҖВңYГўВҖВқ = Yes; ГўВҖВңNГўВҖВқ = No)
PSD-AccountActivity
Check the Access box to allow the user to view customersГўВҖВҷ account activities.
Can View Cheque Images?
Type ГўВҖВңYГўВҖВқ to give the user permission to view images of cheques.
PSD-BillPayment
Check the Access box to allow the user to create bill payments and access the transaction archive.
n/a
PSD-Business Taxes
Check the Access box to allow the user to process electronically available CRA remittance vouchers and to access the transaction archive.
Note: Not connected to the banking host.
n/a
PSD-CRA
Check the Access box to allow the user to submit CRA tax filings and payments and to access the transaction archive.
Note: Customer-serving state only.
n/a
PSD-Deny
Check the Access box to prevent the user from accessing the
PaymentStream
Direct production environment.
Note: To give the user access to a test environment, check the PSD- PrevCompProd, PSD-PrevCompTest, PSD-SYS, or PSD-SYSProd option.
n/a
PSD-eStatements
Check the Access box to allow the user to download eStatements.
n/a
PSD-ManageMobileBanking
Check the Access box to give the user view-only access to text banking functions and the account summary functions.
Can Edit Text Banking Registration?
Type ГўВҖВңYГўВҖВқ to give the user permission to add, delete, enable, and disable mobile phone numbers; to select the accounts accessible via mobile banking; and to edit mobile account nicknames.
Type ГўВҖВңNГўВҖВқ if the user should not have access to the above functions.
PSD-MemberAlerts
Check the Access box to give the user view-only access to the customer alerts functions (including Alerts history) and to the account summary functions.
Can Edit Member Alerts?
Type ГўВҖВңYГўВҖВқ to give the user permission to add, edit, or delete customer Alerts; to add, delete, enable, and disable alerts contacts; and to edit account nicknames for alerts.
Type ГўВҖВңNГўВҖВқ if the user should not have access to the above functions.
PSD-MemberMessages
Check the Access box to allow the user to view customersГўВҖВҷ online banking messages.
n/a
PSD-PANReset (also known as PanChange)
Check the Access box to allow the user to change PANs for customers.
n/a
PSD-PrevCompProd
Check the Access box to allow the user to use the functions they are assigned to (e.g., bill payments) in the PrevCompProd test environment.
Note: The user will have access to both the test and production environments unless the PSD-Deny option is checked. If the PSD-Deny option is checked, the user will only have access to the test environment.
n/a
PSD-PrevCompTest
Check the Access box to allow the user to use the functions they are assigned to (e.g., bill payments) in the PrevCompTest test environment.
Note: The user will have access to both the test and production environments unless the PSD-Deny option is checked. If the PSD-Deny option is checked, the user will only have access to the test environment.
n/a
PSD-Settings
Check the Access box to set the userГўВҖВҷs
PaymentStream
Direct general settings. Although optional, these settings can enhance the use of other functions (e.g., by defining a default branch).
Receive Pending Task Email Notifications?
Type ГўВҖВңYГўВҖВқ or ГўВҖВңNГўВҖВқ to indicate whether the user will be notified of pending tasks (i.e., tasks that need approval or completion) via email.
If no data is entered in this field, notifications will not be sent.
Transactions that are rejected are not communicated to the user by email.
Home Branch Number
This setting only applies to financial institutions that access customer sГўВҖВҷ account information via a branch number
and
a customer number. Enter the userГўВҖВҷs home branch number.
If a branch number is entered in this field, it will be the default branch that appears when the user accesses customer data on
PaymentStream
Direct.
If this field is blank, a default branch will not appear to the user, and they must enter a branch number each time a customerГўВҖВҷs account is accessed.
Note: The branch number is an internally defined 2- or 3-digit number (much like the branch number that customer use in online banking).
PSD-SYS
Check the Access box to allow the user to use the functions they are assigned to (e.g., bill payments) in the PSD-SYS test environment.
Note: The user will have access to both the test and production environments unless the PSD-Deny option is checked. If the PSD-Deny option is checked, the user will only have access to the test environment.
n/a
PSD-SYSProd
Check the Access box to allow the user to use the functions they are assigned to (e.g., bill payments) in the SYSProd test environment.
Note: The user will have access to both the test and production environments unless the PSD-Deny option is checked. If the PSD-Deny option is checked, the user will only have access to the test environment.
n/a
PSD-LockNBlock
Check the Access box to allow the user to block and unblock customer debit cards.
Note: The user will have access to both the test and production environments unless the PSD-Deny option is checked. If the PSD-Deny option is checked, the user will only have access to the test environment.
n/a
PSD-LockNBlock-QA
Check the Access box to allow the user to block and unblock customer debit cards in the QA environment.
n/a
5.3	Granting
PaymentStream
Direct Access to a Client Centre User
There are currently two user management applications running parallel: the Central Portal System (CPS) Admin and User Management. Client Centre Users are displayed in both systems so you can assign access to
PaymentStream
Direct in either CPS Admin or User Management.
This Section describes how a CPS Admin Security Officer assigns access to
PaymentStream
Direct via CPS Admin. For information on how to assign
PaymentStream
Direct access via User Management, refer to the User Management Part.
You must be authorized to assign
PaymentStream
Direct access to others (i.e., you must have administrative access rights) before proceeding. For more information, see Section 5.4, Granting
PaymentStream
Direct Access to an Existing CPS Admin Security Officer.
To grant
PaymentStream
Direct access to a new or existing Client Centre User via CPS Admin:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
CPS Admin
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Production Applications Page
Enter the code that is generated on your registered 2-step security token and then select
Done
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Entering the Code from the 2-Step Security Token
Select
Click here
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Access CPS Admin
Select
Edit User
to add
PaymentStream
Direct to an existing Client Centre User. See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on editing Client Centre Users.
Alternatively, select
Add User
to add
PaymentStream
Direct to a new Client Centre User. See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on creating Client Centre Users.
Scroll down to the Applications Menu once the userГўВҖВҷs profile is displayed and then select the box beside the applicable
PaymentStream
Direct functions. See Figure 6.
Important
:	Each
PaymentStream
Direct function is listed as a separate application. See Section 5.2, PaymentStream Direct ГўВҖВ“ CPS Admin Application IDs Table, for more information.
Figure 6: Assigning PaymentStream Direct Access
Select
Submit
at the bottom of the page.
Have another CPS Admin Security Officer authorize the change.
5.4	Granting
PaymentStream
Direct Access to an Existing CPS Admin Security Officer
There are two ways to manage your CPS Admin Security Officers depending on the change required. You can either send a written request to Central 1 to make a change on your behalf, or you can make the change directly on the User Management application.
If a CPS Admin Security Officer requires both personal and administrative access to
PaymentStream
Direct, or administrative access only, complete the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035, as described below. Administrative access allows the CPS Admin Security Officer to assign the application to other users.
If a CPS Admin Security Officer only requires personal access to
PaymentStream
Direct, another CPS Admin Security Officer can make this change via the User Management application. CPS Admin Security Officers can assign other CPS Admin Security Officers personal access to
PaymentStream
Direct, but they cannot assign administrative rights. See the User Management Part in the Payment Solutions Manual for more information.
To grant
PaymentStream
Direct access to an existing CPS Admin Security Officer via Central 1:
Complete the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035. See Figure 7. Completion of the form is self-explanatory, but note the following:
ГўВ‘
Select
Add
.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Record the applicable
PaymentStream
Direct application ID(s) and any additional parameters in the ГўВҖВңPersonal Access RightsГўВҖВқ section to give the individual personal access to
PaymentStream
Direct. The table in Section 5.2, PaymentStream Direct ГўВҖВ“ CPS Admin Application IDs Table, lists the
PaymentStream
Direct application IDs.
ГўВ‘Вў
Record the applicable
PaymentStream
Direct application ID(s) and any additional parameters in the ГўВҖВңAdministrative RightsГўВҖВқ section if the individual is permitted to assign
PaymentStream
Direct access to Client Centre Users and other CPS Admin Security Officers (personal access only). The table in Section 5.2, PaymentStream Direct ГўВҖВ“ CPS Admin Application IDs Table, lists the
PaymentStream
Direct application IDs.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Ensure that the form is signed by two authorized signing officers.
Figure 7: CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035
Forward the form to your central credit union as indicated on page 2. If applicable, the central credit union will authorize the form and forward it to Central 1.
Retain a copy of the form for your records.
Related Information
CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request,
Form 2035
5.5	Granting
PaymentStream
Direct Access to a New CPS Admin Security Officer
CPS Admin Security Officers canГўВҖВҷt create other CPS Admin Security Officers. These requests must be sent to Central 1. To grant
PaymentStream
Direct access to a new CPS Admin Security Officer:
Complete the CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918. See Figure 8. Completion of the form is self-explanatory, but note the following:
ГўВ‘
Record the applicable
PaymentStream
Direct application ID(s) and any additional parameters in the ГўВҖВңPersonal Access RightsГўВҖВқ section to give the individual personal access to
PaymentStream
Direct. The table in Section 5.2, PaymentStream Direct ГўВҖВ“ CPS Admin Application IDs Table, lists the
PaymentStream
Direct application IDs.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Record the applicable
PaymentStream
Direct application ID(s) and any additional parameters in the ГўВҖВңAdministrative RightsГўВҖВқ section if the individual is permitted to assign
PaymentStream
Direct access to Client Centre Users and other CPS Admin Security Officers (personal access only). The table in Section 5.2, PaymentStream Direct ГўВҖВ“ CPS Admin Application IDs Table, lists the
PaymentStream
Direct application IDs.
ГўВ‘Вў
Ensure that the form is signed by two authorized signing officers.
Figure 8: CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918
Forward the form to your central credit union as indicated on page 2. If applicable, the central credit union will authorize the form and forward it to Central 1.
Retain a copy of the form for your records.
Central 1 will communicate a unique one-time password to the new CPS Admin Security Officer. See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on registering a Client Centre password.
Have another CPS Admin Security Officer assign a 2-step security token to the new CPS Admin Security Officer. Refer to the 2-Step Security Part for procedures.
Related Information
CPS Admin Appointment Certificate,
Form 1918
END
